edits.why: SC-0064 §C ruling (Marcia 2026-06-12): the drafter's proposed place code was renamed to PL5_ELIMELECH_PORTION to match the established PL5_BOAZ_PORTION sub-code pattern (both are portions of PL5-Field). The entity is unchanged; only the code conforms to the registry naming convention. Minted in bcd/places/PL5_ELIMELECH_PORTION-Elimelechs-Portion-of-the-Field.md; P11 map 3B roster wikilinked; 2 FM occurrences renamed.

regens.what: FM regenerated from the amended map: the figure no longer rides objects_in_scene (it still fires via figure_flags); fills unchanged; the 4:5 ham-met stays B? per the A-4 disclosure rule.
